title: aster novi-belgii var. crenifolius
intro: Aster novi-belgii var. crenifolius, also known as New York aster, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its compact growth habit and delicate white to pinkish flowers. Traditionally, Aster novi-belgii var. crenifolius has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Aster novi-belgii var. crenifolius can be used as a tincture, tea, or salve, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
